steps.title: Identify the boundary
steps.content: The shaded region is bounded by a horizontal line at $y = 29$ — a horizontal boundary means the inequality is in $y$ alone (not $x$). That eliminates A and B.

steps.title: Pick the direction of shading
steps.content: The shading is above the horizontal boundary, so the inequality includes values greater than or equal to 29. That matches $y \geq 29$, so D is correct.
